title: platysace linearifolia
intro: Platysace linearifolia, also known as linear-leaved platysace or flat-topped platysace, is a plant species native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian bush medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platysace linearifolia include treating minor wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
